headline: Indonesia Elevators and Escalators Market Size & Growth Forecast Report 2026-2031 Featuring Key Vendors - Otis, KONE, TK, Schindler, Mitsubishi, Hyundai, Hitachi, Fujitec
summary: The Indonesia elevator and escalator market is projected to expand at a CAGR of 3.09% from 2025 to 2031, driven by the burgeoning construction sector and strategic government projects. Key growth factors include urbanization, aging demographics, and AI integration, with major urban rail projects fueling demand for vertical transportation systems. Challenges such as high upfront costs and currency volatility persist. Leading players like KONE, Otis, and Schindler dominate the market, reflecting a
